scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n identity,wallet,bridge,ai,gateway -c blue,magenta,cyan,green,yellow "npm --prefix services/identity-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/wallet-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/bridge-service run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/ai-orchestrator run start:dev" "npm --prefix services/api-gateway run start:dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n services,bots,web -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:services" "npm run dev:bots" "npm run dev:web"
